subcodes.first_line: Sanctified praise, transcending pen and ink, and hallowed beyond leaf and tongue, befitteth Him Who is the Object of all the worlds [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد مقدس از قلم و مداد و منزه از ورقه و لسان مقصود عالمیان را لایق و سزاست
subcodes.subjects: @eulogies; reminiscences, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @praise and encouragement, @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @personal instructions
